summary: Completed comprehensive frontend UI testing of the Zorka Holding static landing page across desktop (1440x900) and mobile (375x800) viewports. All testids from /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/landing.js are present in the rendered DOM. Nav smooth-scroll works for all 5 sections. Hero video element has correct src + autoplay/muted/loop/playsInline attrs. Investment Criteria section renders all 11 cards. About shows founder photo + Paul Skapets mention. Mission has 'Value First' heading + win-win body. Portfolio has exactly 2 neutral-gray placeholder items. Contact renders phone/email/location with correct values and NO form/inputs exist. Footer shows CRE tagline + current year (2026). Responsive: multi-col criteria grid on desktop (4 cols), single col on mobile. Mobile hamburger toggle opens menu with all 5 links; clicking closes menu and scrolls to section. No horizontal scrollbar on either viewport. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Email displayed is 'acquisitions@zorcaholding.com' (spelled 'zorca') while brand is 'Zorka Holding' — likely intentional per problem statement but worth confirming with product owner as it could be a typo (Zorka vs Zorca).
Hero background video is 57MB — consider providing a lower-resolution poster/preload image or shorter clip for faster first paint; not a blocker for static site.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure static landing page — no backend, no forms, no auth. All 40+ testids verified, both viewports tested, nav smooth-scroll verified, mobile menu toggle verified. Frontend fully passes acceptance criteria.
